title: Scaffold extension repo and MV3 manifest
description: Create the kkit-chrome-connect GitHub repo, set up the MV3 manifest with required permissions (debugger, storage, offscreen, alarms), TypeScript config, and build pipeline (tsc only). Include placeholder background.ts service worker and popup files.
acceptanceCriteria: GitHub repo RockaRhymeLLC/kkit-chrome-connect created and cloned
manifest.json is valid MV3 with permissions: debugger, storage, offscreen, alarms, activeTab
TypeScript compiles with tsc to dist/ directory
Extension loads in Chrome as unpacked without errors
